features.name: ESMFold Protein Structure Prediction
features.description: Predicts the 3D structure of a protein from its amino acid sequence using the ESMFold model via NVIDIA BioNeMo. Results are surfaced as a dataframe and an interactive panel in the Bio context.
features.evidence_summary: EsmFold function, esmfoldPython script, and Bio|EsmFold widget share the ESMFold name root and collectively implement protein structure prediction from sequence.

features.name: DiffDock Molecular Docking
features.description: Predicts the 3D binding pose of a small molecule against a protein target using the DiffDock diffusion model, with a supporting context panel and target-file helper for batch workflows.
features.evidence_summary: DiffDock, diffDockModelScript, getTargetFiles, diffdockPython, and Biology|DiffDock panel share the DiffDock name root; changelog confirms docking menu naming and info-panel bug fixes.

features.name: MolMIM Controlled Molecule Generation
features.description: Generates novel molecules with desired properties using the MolMIM model, supporting controlled latent-space exploration with configurable generation parameters.
features.evidence_summary: MolMIMModel function and MolMIMGenerate script share the MolMIM name root and together implement the controlled molecule generation workflow.
